subheadings.heading: Protocol Infrastructure & Setup
content: # Load CAN kernel modules on Linux
sudo modprobe can can_raw can_bcm vcan
# Setup virtual CAN interface (testing)
sudo ip link add dev vcan0 type vcan && sudo ip link set up vcan0
# Configure physical CANtact/similar interface (500k bitrate)
sudo ip link set can0 type can bitrate 500000 && sudo ip link set up can0

subheadings.heading: Traffic Sniffing & Live Analysis
content: # candump: Real-time traffic monitoring
candump can0 -c  # Color output
candump can0,7DF:7FF  # Filter specific diagnostic IDs
# cansniffer: Visualizing changing bytes in real-time
cansniffer can0
# Log traffic to file for later analysis
candump -l can0  # Generates .log file

subheadings.heading: Replay & Injection Attacks
content: # Inject a single data frame
# Replay attack from a captured log
canplayer -I capture.log can0
# Randomized fuzzing with cangen
cangen can0 -g 10 -I i  # Random IDs with 10ms gap

subheadings.heading: Unified Diagnostic Services (UDS)
content: **0x10 (Diagnostic Session)**: Entering extended sessions for privileged operations.
**0x27 (Security Access)**: Brute-forcing the seed-key algorithm to unlock protected services.
**0x2E (Write Data)**: Modifying configuration parameters or memory bytes directly.
**0x34/35 (Transfer)**: Requesting download/upload of firmware blobs.

subheadings.heading: Python-OBD Data Retrieval
content: import obd
connection = obd.OBD()  # Auto-connect to ELM327
print(connection.query(obd.commands.RPM))
print(connection.query(obd.commands.SPEED))

subheadings.heading: UDS Firmware Extraction
content: # 1. Request seed for security access
# 2. Send calculated key back
cansend can0 7E0#022702[KEY_DATA]
# 3. Request memory upload at specific address
cansend can0 7E0#103400[address][size]

subheadings.heading: Key Fob & RF Attacks
content: **Relay Attack**: Bridging signals between two SDRs to spoof proximity to the vehicle.
**Rolling Code Analysis**: Using [Universal Radio Hacker (URH)](https://github.com/jopohl/urh) to reverse KeeLoq or similar protocols.
**TPMS Spoofing**: Monitoring and spoofing tire pressure data on 315/433 MHz.

subheadings.heading: Security Analysis Toolkit
content: [Caring Caribou](https://github.com/CaringCaribou/caringcaribou) - Modular automotive security exploration tool.
[ICSim](https://github.com/zombieCraig/ICSim) - High-fidelity instrument cluster simulator for offline practice.
[SavvyCAN](https://github.com/collin80/SavvyCAN) - Advanced cross-platform GUI for CAN bus reverse engineering.

subheadings.heading: Legal & Safety Compliance
subheadings.content: ⚠️ **CRITICAL SAFETY WARNING**: Never test automotive systems on public roads or while a vehicle is in motion. Unauthorized testing may void warranties, violate local laws (CFAA), and pose severe physical risks. Ensure all testing is performed in controlled environments on hardware you own or have explicit written permission to audit.
